source_pr.title: planner, executor: merge window functions with same specification name
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Previously, we could only process one window function in one window executor. This PR merges the execution of different window functions according to their window specification name.

### What is changed and how it works?

In the planner stage, it first extracts the window functions from field list and order by clause. After that, it groups and builds the window functions according to specification name. In the executor, it also adjusts the executor so it can handle multiple window functions.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - Increased code complexity

Related changes

 - None

symptoms: sql: "select row_number() over w, sum(c) over w from t window w as (order by a)" had a brittle exact plan assertion in TestWindowFunction (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go).
failure_signature: sql: "select row_number() over w, sum(c) over w from t window w as (order by a)" had a brittle exact plan assertion in TestWindowFunction (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go).
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact logical plan string for window functions, and the planner can produce different-but-equivalent window operator shapes. This PR stabilizes it by removing the unstable exact-plan cases and adding stable executor-level result assertions instead.
fix_pattern: Replace brittle exact plan assertions with stable result checks (remove unstable logical plan test cases and add executor-level query result checks).

evidence: evidence: remove unstable exact-plan assertion for window functions (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/window.go, executor/window_test.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/explain.go, planner/core/expression_rewriter.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/physical_plans.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, planner/core/resolve_indices.go, planner/core/rule_column_pruning.go, planner/core/rule_eliminate_projection.go, planner/core/stats.go, planner/core/stringer.go, planner/core/util.go
